publishedAbstract: - The ODF StorageCluster CR is missing when running the command below: ~~~ oc get storagecluster-n openshift-storage ~~~- BUT there is another storagecluster in the portworx namespace: ~~~ # oc get storagecluster-A NAMESPACE NAME CLUSTER UUID STATUS VERSION AGE portworx px-cluster 635xxxxx-2xx5-xxxx-96be-xxxxxx Running 3.5.0 28d ~~~- But NO storagecluster in ODF ~~~ # oc get storagecluster-n openshift-storage-o yaml apiVersion: v1 items: [] kind: List metadata: resourceVersion: "" ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF StorageCluster ocs-storage is not appearing when Portworx is installed
